title: Maped Creativ Window Stickers Stencil Kit Assorted Fun Activity Kit for Kids 5+
features: Hours of Fun: Transform your child's world into a vibrant, personalised wonderland with the Maped Creativ Window Stickers. This exciting and interactive product allows kids to unleash their creativity and customize their windows and accessories like never before!

Peelable & Removable Gel Stickers: With these peelable gel stickers, your child can easily apply their colorful creations to multiple surfaces, including windows, mirrors, and more. Watch as their designs come to life and brighten up any space in the house.

Everything Included: The kit includes three sticker templates that provide inspiration and guidance for young artists. They can choose from a variety of designs, from playful animals to funky patterns, and bring them to life with the four included bright-colored gels. Additionally, the kit features a thicker black gel for outlining, adding depth and definition to their creations.

Imaginative Play: Suitable for ages 5 and up, the Maped Creativ Window Stickers offer an engaging and age-appropriate activity that promotes artistic expression, fine motor skills development, and imaginative play. Your child will love the freedom to design and decorate their own world, creating a truly unique environment that reflects their personality and style.

Creative Learning: Whether they're designing a whimsical scene, showcasing their favorite characters, or simply adding a splash of color to their space, these window stickers provide endless possibilities for creative expression. Let your child's imagination soar with the Maped Creativ Window Stickers and watch as their artistic talents bloom!
description: Product Description Maped Creativ Window Stickers Kit. Maped is a family owned company and has grown to become a world leader in the design and manufacture of school and office supplies. The iconic British stationery brands Helix and Oxford are now part of the Maped family, and their traditional education ranges are complemented by Maped’s range of design-led and innovative products. With a variety of stylish and functional products for adults and kids alike at home or school, Maped continues to reinvent ways to let you express yourself freely! For over 60 years. Maped has been creating innovative, high-quality products and renewing the often-traditional school and office accessories markets with an assortment of ergonomic and eye-catching products tailored to the needs of the consumer. Maped is an expert in providing attractive and functional school, artist, and office products to over 125 countries all over the world! Safety Warning External use only. Suitable for ages 5+.
